projects.name: Hire_OS

recruiterBullets.problem: Fragmented hiring tools (spreadsheets, email, disconnected ATS) slow teams and lose candidates.
recruiterBullets.feature: Unified platform with AI-assisted screening, pipeline views, and team collaboration.
recruiterBullets.impact: 40% faster time-to-screen; centralized data; real-time funnel visibility for hiring managers.

projects.problem: Recruiting teams juggle fragmented tools — spreadsheets, email threads, and disconnected ATS workflows slow hiring and lose top candidates.
projects.solution: Built a unified hiring OS with AI-assisted screening, pipeline visualization, and collaborative workflows — one platform from job post to offer.
projects.impact: Reduced time-to-screen by 40%, centralized candidate data, and gave hiring managers real-time visibility across the entire funnel.
highlights: End-to-end pipeline from job posting to offer letter

projects.name: RapFlowAI

recruiterBullets.problem: Writers hit blocks maintaining flow and rhyme consistency.
recruiterBullets.feature: AI-assisted lyrics with rhyme schemes and flow analysis.
recruiterBullets.impact: Faster ideation with exportable lyric sheets.

projects.problem: Creators struggle to break writer's block and maintain consistent flow patterns across verses.
projects.solution: Engineered an AI-assisted rap writing tool with rhyme schemes, flow analysis, and iterative generation.
projects.impact: Enabled rapid ideation for artists with context-aware suggestions.

projects.name: School ERP

recruiterBullets.problem: Paper records and disconnected tools slowed school operations.
recruiterBullets.feature: Modular ERP — attendance, grades, fees, role-based dashboards.
recruiterBullets.impact: Digitized core ops; less admin overhead; better parent communication.

projects.problem: Schools relied on paper records and disconnected software for attendance, fees, and academics.
projects.solution: Delivered a modular ERP with role-based dashboards for admins, teachers, students, and parents.
projects.impact: Digitized core operations and improved parent-teacher communication.
